category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Kenya market (KEBS adopting EN 149 under the PVoC programme, DOSHS occupational framework, Import Standardization Mark, medical masks via PPB).

title.en: China-to-Kenya PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入肯尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入肯亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Kenya requirements: KEBS mandatory Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC), per-consignment Certificate of Conformity, Standardization/Import Standardization Mark, DOSHS occupational-safety framework, importer obligations, and Kenya 240 V, 50 Hz electrical-adaptation requirements where relevant.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与肯尼亚要求对照，涵盖肯尼亚标准局（KEBS）强制出口前一致性核验（PVoC）、按批次合格证、标准化/进口标准化标志、DOSHS职业安全框架、进口商义务，以及肯尼亚240 V、50 Hz供电适配要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與肯亞要求對照，涵蓋肯尼亞標準局（KEBS）強制出口前一致性核驗（PVoC）、按批次符合性證書、標準化/進口標準化標誌、DOSHS職業安全框架、進口商義務，以及肯亞240 V、50 Hz供電適配要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs ruling, market-access approval, or replacement for legal review. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Kenya law, KEBS published PVoC scope, Standards Act references, DOSHS occupational obligations, PPB medical-mask rules, and port clearance procedures at Mombasa with qualified professionals before shipment or placing products on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准，不能替代法律合规咨询。出口商、进口商和分销商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行肯尼亚法律、KEBS发布的PVoC范围、标准法条款、DOSHS职业安全义务、PPB医用口罩规则及蒙巴萨口岸清关流程。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准，不能替代法律合規諮詢。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行肯亞法律、KEBS發佈的PVoC範圍、標準法條款、DOSHS職業安全義務、PPB醫用口罩規則及蒙巴薩口岸清關流程。

answer_first.en: Kenya requires respiratory filters and respirators to pass KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC), obtain a per-consignment Certificate of Conformity, and carry the Kenya Import Standardization Mark. Chinese GB 2626 test reports and CCC certificates do not replace the Kenya route. For workplace respiratory protection, DOSHS expectations still apply, and the importer must be identified for Mombasa customs clearance. The main practical difference from EU markets is that Kenya uses the KEBS PVoC and import Mark route; for medical masks, PPB controls apply.
answer_first.zh: 肯尼亚要求过滤式呼吸防护产品经过KEBS出口前一致性核验（PVoC）、取得每批次符合性证书，并加贴进口标准化标志。中国GB 2626检测报告和CCC证书不能替代肯尼亚路径。面向工作场所的使用仍适用DOSHS要求，且必须由境内进口商承担责任并参与蒙巴萨口岸清关。与欧盟不同的是，肯尼亚采用KEBS PVoC+进口标准化标志主导路径；医用口罩则由PPB监管。
answer_first.zht: 肯亞要求過濾式呼吸防護產品經過KEBS出口前一致性核驗（PVoC）、取得每批次符合性證書，並加貼進口標準化標誌。中國GB 2626檢測報告和CCC證書不能替代肯亞路徑。面向工作場所的使用仍適用DOSHS要求，且必須由境內進口商承擔責任並參與蒙巴薩口岸清關。與歐盟不同的是，肯亞採用KEBS PVoC+進口標準化標誌主導路徑；醫用口罩則由PPB監管。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator, standards body, and primary legal source preferred.
